nodes.label: Markdown source of truth, Notion mirror
Goal: durable citable understanding of AI x a11y
Active KRs: Tier 1 sources, first researcher run
Q: GPT-4o vs Claude vs Gemini alt-text quality
Q: WCAG SC most violated by v0/Bolt/Lovable
Rationale: Next.js doesnt move focus on client nav
Two global live regions polite + assertive
Rationale: listbox not grid, not native DnD
Rationale: log-as-live floods SR with history
Use Radix Dialog (no custom focus trap)
Screen reader testing plan per view
Rationale: compact reduces padding not target size (2.5.8)
Rationale: dnd-kit shares lift/drop semantics + announcement API
Inline edit in Dialog not contenteditable
Rationale: multiple ad-hoc aria-live = stuttering mess
X voice (sharp, one idea per tweet)
Forbidden: reuse LinkedIn body on X
Posts must link to research note (no hot takes)
Notion mirror within 1 hour of ready

hyperedges.label: Stage-only / no auto-publish across all platforms
